headlines.title: LeBron James free agency: Making the case for each finalist
headlines.wce_line: LeBron James' 3-point shooting remains below the league average at just 16th percentile, which could impact his effectiveness for any potential new team.

headlines.title: Jordan Walsh, Celtics Agree To Three-Year, $16M Extension
headlines.wce_line: Walsh's new deal includes a significant pay increase, reflecting his solid performance, particularly in rebounding and shooting efficiency.

headlines.title: Heat Say Link To LeBron James Press Conference Live Stream Posted By Mistake
headlines.wce_line: The Miami Heat mistakenly posted a live stream titled "LeBron James Introductory Press Conference" for July 27.

headlines.title: Victor Wembanyama, Caitlin Clark, and Derrick Rose are NBA 2K27 cover athletes
headlines.wce_line: The Deluxe Edition of NBA 2K27 offers 100,000 VC MyCAREER content for Caitlin Clark, including various skill and Gatorade boosts.

headlines.title: Jae'Sean Tate, Rockets Agree To One-Year, $3.07M Deal
headlines.wce_line: Tate's new deal is partially guaranteed for $1.04 million out of the total $3.07 million.

headlines.title: Pelicans Exploring Trade Options For Jordan Hawkins
headlines.wce_line: The Pelicans are seeking trades for Jordan Hawkins, who struggled in key statistical categories last season.

headlines.title: LeBron James rumors on superstar trade demands, who’s calling him, favorites, and more
headlines.wce_line: LeBron James might be using his leverage to potentially trade for Kyrie Irving or Anthony Davis, aiming to recreate past championship success.

headlines.title: Grizzlies, D’Angelo Russell Seeking Buyout Or Trade
headlines.wce_line: Russell’s buyout or trade would align with the Grizzlies’ need for a veteran presence on a contender, given his significant offensive usage and assist percentages.

headlines.title: Three ripple effects of LeBron James' lengthy free agency, and why Adam Silver is anxious for a decision
headlines.wce_line: The 2026-27 NBA schedule remains in flux due to LeBron James' undecided future, impacting plans for marquee games and roster planning across the league.

headlines.title: David Jones-Garcia, Spurs Sign Two-Way Deal
headlines.wce_line: David Jones-Garcia signed a two-way contract with the Spurs after going undrafted from Memphis last year.

headlines.title: NBA Rookie Rankings: Who's at the head of the class after Summer League?
headlines.wce_line: Cameron Boozer consistently showcased his versatility and confidence in both Salt Lake City and Vegas Summer Leagues, impressing with his ability to create opportunities for teammates.

headlines.title: NBA trade grades for Lu Dort 3-team deal with Hawks, Mavs, and Thunder
headlines.wce_line: The Hawks enhance their defensive prowess by acquiring Lu Dort, who is set to become a free agent next season, providing the team with valuable cap flexibility.

headlines.title: Jaron Pierre Jr. Agrees To Two-Way Contract With Pelicans
headlines.wce_line: Jaron Pierre Jr., a versatile guard who played for multiple colleges, joins the Pelicans on a two-way contract.

headlines.title: Rockets Hiring Chip Engelland As Assistant Coach
headlines.wce_line: Engelland's expertise in player development and shooting could help the Rockets improve their three-point accuracy and increase their attempts from beyond the arc next season.

headlines.title: LeBron James May Remain Genuinely Undecided On Free Agency Decision
headlines.wce_line: LeBron James remains undecided, with his agent Rich Paul stating no further action is needed from the teams interested in signing him.

headlines.title: Valencia Basket Announces Deal With Mouhamadou Gueye
headlines.wce_line: Valencia Basket's addition of Mouhamadou Gueye brings a player who ranks at the 20th percentile in Box Plus/Minute to their roster.

headlines.title: The NBA's waiting game: LeBron James and the biggest remaining questions of the offseason
headlines.wce_line: The league is operating at less than full capacity, with 98% of teams in the dark about LeBron James' future decisions.

headlines.title: Defensive wing Jordan Walsh reportedly extends with Boston on three-year, $16 million deal
headlines.wce_line: This extension locks Jordan Walsh in with Boston for at least three more years, with the first two years fully guaranteed.

headlines.title: 8 backup plans for the Sixers if they whiff on LeBron James
headlines.wce_line: Nick Richards, who averaged 9.5 points and 8.1 rebounds in 24.3 minutes per game, could be the best remaining free-agent fit for the Sixers' backup center role.

headlines.title: Every additional day without a Jalen Duren resolution is … fine
headlines.wce_line: Every passing day is one closer to an eventual resolution, as both sides continue to test their parameters in RFA negotiations.

headlines.title: Quentin Grimes wants to be a leader defensively for Lakers
headlines.wce_line: Grimes aims to improve his defensive game, stepping into a larger role with the Lakers after primarily being known for his offense.

headlines.title: Luke Travers Returns To Melbourne United On Two-Year Deal
headlines.wce_line: Travers aims to boost Melbourne United's defense with his 26th percentile Box Plus/Minus when he returns for two seasons.

headlines.title: Who needs LeBron James the most? Ranking which suitors are in the most trouble if he picks someone else
headlines.wce_line: The Philadelphia 76ers, lacking a playmaker, stand to gain significantly from LeBron James's presence, though their offseason moves already suggest they are making strides without him.

headlines.title: LeBron James’ Lakers legacy reveals power, price of modern NBA superstar
headlines.wce_line: James' high usage and assist percentages reflect his transformative role, both offensively and as a playmaker, for the Lakers.

headlines.title: Countdown: Top 5 Spurs moments vs. LeBron James
headlines.wce_line: LeBron James ranks in the 92nd percentile for usage rate and 96th for assist rate this season, showcasing his playmaking prowess.

headlines.title: Rockets Re-Sign Isaiah Crawford
headlines.wce_line: Isaiah Crawford's re-signing with the Rockets pushes them into luxury tax territory due to his four-year, $11.27MM contract.

headlines.title: Red Sox's record-tying win streak ends; LeBron James set for another historically long free agency
headlines.wce_line: LeBron James' free agency period has reached 25 days, putting him in fourth place for the longest among stars since 1999.

headlines.wce_line: The "Beam Boys" and Precious Achiuwa, both achieving high rebounding percentiles, will look to build on their success in the upcoming season.

headlines.wce_line: Bronny James expresses uncertainty about his father's potential move to the Warriors, suggesting they might soon face off in the Pacific Division.

analytics.wce_line: The study found that increasing rim attempts while decreasing midrange and perimeter shots could improve overall team performance according to an optimized shot selection model.

analytics.title: Top NBA Stars with the Highest True Shooting Percentage (TS%)
analytics.wce_line: True Shooting Percentage (TS%) helps distinguish between players who score efficiently and those who rely on volume, even if their point totals are similar.

analytics.wce_line: Rest days significantly impact player efficiency, altering their performance metrics beyond just points or minutes played.

analytics.title: Possession-Level Player Impact in the Pre-Play-by-Play NBA Era: A Video-Reconstructed RAPM Database, 1984--1996
analytics.wce_line: The study reconstructed 2,179 games from 1984-85 to 1995-96 using video footage to create RAPM estimates for pre-play-by-play NBA seasons.

analytics.title: Quantifying Officiating Impact in the NBA: A Referee Impact Metric Analysis Using ESPN Win-Probability Data
analytics.wce_line: The study introduces RIM, a metric that quantifies officiating impact by aggregating win-probability changes from foul events in NBA games.

analytics.wce_line: The article explores Dylan Harper's skill development and future prospects in basketball.

analytics.wce_line: The article analyzes strategies Minnesota Wolves could use to defend against Victor Wembanyama.

analytics.title: Comparing Powerwise (PWR) and the NCAA Power Index (NPI): Advising the NCAA Men's Division I Lacrosse Committee
analytics.wce_line: The study finds that Powerwise (PWR) outperforms the NCAA Power Index (NPI) for ranking team sports with wider margins of victory, such as basketball.

analytics.title: A Rolling-Horizon Stochastic Optimization Framework for NBA Franchise Management with Distributionally Robust Risk Constraints
analytics.wce_line: The study uses the New York Knicks to develop a unified decision-making framework for NBA franchises, focusing on optimizing long-term value while managing risk.

analytics.title: The Load Management Paradox: Correcting the Healthy-Worker Survivor Effect in NBA Injury Modeling
analytics.wce_line: The study found that adjusting for selection mechanisms using MS-PEM reliably shifts the hazard rate, correcting the paradoxical relationship between workload and injury in NBA players.

analytics.title: STAMP: A shot-type-aware areal multilevel Poisson model for league-wide comparison of basketball shot charts
analytics.wce_line: The study developed a model that jointly analyzes shot attempts across different court regions, seasons, and shot types to provide better predictive performance and interpretable insights into team shooting tendencies.

analytics.title: The Value of Graph-based Encoding in NBA Salary Prediction
analytics.wce_line: The study found that incorporating graph-based embeddings into salary prediction models improves accuracy, especially for veteran players whose salaries are less predictable based on performance alone.
